security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Browse Codex-generated images by timeline and session.
bundle.longDescription: A local-first desktop gallery for browsing, favoriting, previewing, and exporting images generated by Codex.
